client_id.description: Auth0 client ID. Used to resolve the application's login initiation endpoint.

connection_id.description: The id of the connection to force invitee to authenticate with.

ttl_sec.description: Number of seconds for which the invitation is valid before expiration. If unspecified or set to 0, this value defaults to 604800 seconds (7 days). Max value: 2592000 seconds (30 days).

roles.description: List of roles IDs to associated with the user.

send_invitation_email.description: Whether the user will receive an invitation email (true) or no email (false), true by default
